positive: A minimal, abstract illustration featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette rising from geometric fields of color. The mountains should have clean, crisp lines and strong contrast against a gradient background of warm sunset hues (deep orange, burnt sienna, dusty pink). Include subtle celestial elements, such as crescent moons and stylized constellations, rendered in matte gold leaf textures. The overall composition must be perfectly centered, highly scalable, and suitable for direct apparel printing. Vector art quality, flat graphic style, perfect symmetry, elegant, zen aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, messy, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, painting, photorealism, grainy, bokeh
